parsed_review.summary: CP00-847 read-only review: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS. Descriptor-only RP28 Marketplace bridge (ReviewGate tail + AppPermission slice + relationship-map head), no runtime opened, no real data/secrets, boundaries and authority limits intact, coverage matches the live plan, contract projection consistent. production_ready honestly not yet asserted. One P3: full validation suite still pending (expected sequencing). No P0/P1/P2.

findings.title: Full closeout validation suite not executed within read-only review scope
findings.details: command-evidence.json records only two preliminary commands (npm run rp28:marketplace:validate and node --test packages/marketplace/test/*.test.js), both exit_code 0, with status 'pending_full_validation' and gate_outcome 'pending_valid_review_and_full_validation'. The broader closeout suite expected before promotion (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is not yet evidenced. As a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob, no Bash) I verified code/contract/test/plan consistency by static inspection only and cannot execute these commands; their passing remains a prerequisite for production_ready. The two recorded exit-0 results are agent-reported and were not re-run here.
findings.recommendation: Orchestrator must run and capture the full validation command suite at exit 0 before flipping production_ready=true and committing. This static review confirms structural soundness but does not substitute for executing the suite.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected workflow sequencing, not a code defect; production_ready is correctly still false and gate_outcome already records pending_full_validation. Does not block this review gate.
